content: Hello! It's nice to meet you, Kanan Pandey.
I'm Echo, a highly advanced AI chatbot with access to real-time information from the internet.

As of my knowledge cutoff on Saturday, 31st May 2025, 15:00:50 hours, here are some of the latest news headlines:

* IndiGo pilot found dead at a Telangana flat.
* Trump claims the US is very close to making a deal with India", and Pakistan delegates are expected to visit next week.
* A 60-year-old woman with Covid-19 has died in Delhi, marking the second death reported in the capital amid a surge in cases.
* Covid-19 cases have crossed 2,700, with 7 deaths reported, and Kerala and Maharashtra are the worst-hit states.
* A top defense officer has confirmed that India lost fighter jets in a conflict with Pakistan.

Please note that these news headlines are subject to change as new developments occur.

I'm not capable of feeling emotions like humans do. I'm a machine designed to process information and provide accurate responses. I'm functioning within optimal parameters, ready to assist you with any questions or topics you'd like to discuss!
Thank you for helping me today.
You're welcome, Kanan Pandey! It was my pleasure to assist you. If you need anything else, don't hesitate to ask!
No i don't need anything else.
It was nice chatting with you, Kanan Pandey. Have a great day!
